Package egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.impl

Class EgovBBSManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.cop.bbs.service.impl.EgovBBSManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovBBSManageService
@Service("EgovBBSManageService") public class EgovBBSManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovBBSManageService
게시물 관리를 위한 서비스 구현 클래스
Since:
2009.03.19
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통 서비스 개발팀 한성곤
